chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-1214 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.5281/2021. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.5282 /2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 27.07.2021 Syed Tarique Ahmed Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. == 1. Urgency is disposed of. 2to4. It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that the petitioner is owner of the subject land therefrom he is being harassed to be dispossessed by the respondents under the pretext that it is forest land, without having a proper demarcation whereof, therefore, such act of the respondents is to be checked/prevented by this Court. If it is believed to be so, then issue of ownership of the subject land together with its demarcation and dispossession involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its Constitutional Jurisdiction under the garb of harassment. Consequently, instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*,

Consequently, instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*, ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.S-351 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.938/2021. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.939/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 27.07.2021 Mr. Ali Raza, Advocate for the petitioner. == It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that the petitioner is being harassed by the private respondents. By contending so, he sought for protection for the petitioner from such harassment. The protection which is sought for by the petitioner has already been ordered in his favour by Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace Shaheed Benazir Abad vide his order dated 14.12.2018 passed in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.2550 of 2018. No further order in that respect is called for to be passed by could be passed by this Court in favour of the petitioner in exercise of its Constitutional Jurisdiction by way of instant petition same being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed applications. JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*,

No further order in that respect is called for to be passed by could be passed by this Court in favour of the petitioner in exercise of its Constitutional Jurisdiction by way of instant petition same being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed applications. JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*, ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.S-371 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.940/2021. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.941/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 27.07.2021 Mr. Ghulam Sarwar Khushk, Advocate for the petitioners. == 1. Urgency is disposed of. 2to4. It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioners that the petitioners on account of having entered into wedlock are now being harassed by the private respondents. By contending so, he sought for protection for the petitioners from such harassment. The protection which is sought for by the petitioners has already been ordered in their favour by Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace Shaheed Benazir Abad vide his order dated 04.05.2021 passed in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.1181 of 2021. No further order in that respect is called for to be passed by this Court in favour of the petitioners in exercise of its Constitutional Jurisdiction by way of instant petition same being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed application. JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*,
